title: Blades of Pride 02: Lesbian Xiphos
description: This resource pack changes the netherite sword to be something a little bit more saphic! Happy pride!
body:
Hello again! This is the second pack in a series I am making for pride month this june, this time I've made a lesbian pride sword, inspired by a greek xiphos. This pack only retextures the netherite sword and should be compatible with any version after 1.16.

**If you like this resource pack please consider supporting the creator of the lesbian flag Emily Gwen through one of the shops linked in her carrd, the carrd itself is linked under donate on the sidebar instead of my kofi.**

Fun fact: Despite popular belief, a bronze xiphos has never been found.
